subject: refactor(claude): replace hardcoded pattern table with dynamic source reference
body:
Downstream repos should always fetch implementation patterns from glow-props
rather than maintaining local copies. Replaced the static 8-row table in
"Suggested Implementations" with "Implementation Patterns (Source of Truth)"
that provides fetch commands and discovery instructions. Added prohibition
against local copies and AI note to always fetch from glow-props.

Tags: documentation, patterns, cross-repo
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-library
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_011sWgK8Kz46ZHFN6S86mt4A
